Lhospital rule

人地中學你教大學野
用法岩 考評啲垃圾老師未必識 照當你錯

(1+2/x)^(x+3)
= (1+ (1/(x/2))^(x+3)
= (1+ (1/(x/2))^[(x/2) + (x/2+3)]
= (1+ (1/(x/2))^(x/2) ‧ (1+ (1/(x/2))^(x/2+3)
= [(1+ (1/(x/2))^(x/2)]^2 ‧ (1+ (1/(x/2))^(+3)
Put y = x/2
As y = infinity, x/2 = infinity
Take limit, it becomes e^2
(Because as x = infinity, 2/x = 0)
